creator: agh@riseup.net
text:
Created attachment 242069
Patch to 34.0.0 and restore build on 14-CURRENT

Hello,

I found Masachika's fix (bug #270714, comment #1) for building devel/android-tools on 14-CURRENT, it looks like that patch is based on upstream work in BoringSSL (https://github.com/google/boringssl/commit/af34f6460f0bf99dc267818f02b2936f60a30de7).

After that, I thought I would have a go at updating devel/android-tools. Turns out that was far easier than expected, too easy, so easy that I am not sure if I really updated the port at all, however, patch is attached, including the patch for restoring the build on 14-CURRENT.

Thanks Neel, thanks Masachika.
